title: ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel 8.75in Gardening Folding Trowel with 1mm Nylon Pouch
description:
Keep your garden nice and tidy at all times with the ASR Outdoor Mini Folding Trowel! The ASR Outdoor Mini Folding Trowel is a great addition to any gardener's tool collection. Each trowel is constructed of heavy-gauge stainless steel, so it wont rust or corrode. Fully extended, the trowel measures 8.75" and folded it's just 5.75". It comes with a nylon storage pouch for easy organization and transportation when not in use. Make sure to keep one of these trowels around for planting, weeding or digging! You may also want to bring one along camping, hiking or other outdoor trips!
